description: Full 75-cell coordination-threshold (k*) phase-diagram sweep over the (beta, kappa, c) grid of minimal_specialization-v1. k* is the smallest coalition size k in 1..4 whose best simultaneous deviation from the uniform policy yields a per-step team-return gap with bootstrap CI lower bound > 0.
notes: Committed verbatim so the issue #430 Task 2 join (kstar_vs_trainability.py) is reproducible without cross-repo access. Per #442 / thrust#458, beta is inert: the 75 (beta, kappa, c) cells collapse to 15 effective (kappa, c) columns with identical k* (in this artifact k* is a pure function of kappa).
